arts.ttl: Luka Modric breaks 58-year-old Real Madrid record in Celta Vigo victory
arts.sum: Luka Modric becomes the oldest player in Real Madrid's history as he comes off the bench to provide an assist in Saturday's 2-1 La Liga triumph over Celta Vigo.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti credits one player with ‘saving’ Real Madrid vs Celta Vigo
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Saturday night moved to lavish praise on a leading member of his midfield ranks. The player in question? Luka Modrić. Real were…

arts.ttl: Three questions and three answers from Celta Vigo 1-2 Real Madrid
arts.sum: Those three worked tirelessly behind them to press the Celta Vigo defence to some extent, but the system once again left gaps which opened up all over the field, particularly on Real Madrid’s right flank where Antonio Rüdiger and Aurelién Tchouameni both seemed to shirk the responsibility of providing some cover to help out their team-mate Lucas Vázquez. Vázquez is now pretty much the only option available to Carlo Ancelotti on the right of defence, but his performance in Galicia left many of the question marks from his critics as to whether he is a strong enough option for Real Madrid to compete.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé overtakes Erling Haaland with latest Real Madrid goal
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé on Saturday took sole ownership of the title of top-scorer in Europe’s top-5 leagues this calendar year. As much came courtesy of his exploits in…

arts.ttl: Barcelona leading Real Madrid in race for free agent defender
arts.sum: Barcelona are ahead of arch rivals Real Madrid in the race for Bayer Leverkusen star Jonathan Tah. That’s according to Relevo transfer insider Matteo Moretto, who has on Saturday provided…

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe and Vini Jr seal Vigo victory for Real Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid cruised back into La Liga action with a 2-1 win on the road at Celta Vigo. The visitors were forced to dig deep in the second half after being handed a superb half time lead by the returning Kylian Mbappe. Mbappe continued his hot streak in front of goal, to fire home his eighth […] The post Kylian Mbappe and Vini Jr seal Vigo victory for Real Madrid appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Immediate Reaction: Celta Vigo 1-2 Real Madrid
arts.sum: The international break was over, and it was time for Real Madrid to get straight back into league action away to Celta Vigo. Celta Vigo 1-2 Real Madrid (Mbappé & Vinícius Júnior).

arts.ttl: Spanish Journalist Claims Real Madrid Regret Signing Kylian Mbappe
arts.sum: Things don't appear to be going swimmingly in Spain for the superstar
